title: Creative Crafting Grid
description: Add the 2x2 crafting slots to the creative inventory screen.
body:
Add the survival crafting slots to the creative inventory screen. These slots are shown in all gamemodes except creative. They are generally only used in survival and adventure mode, however, their contents are tracked and can be modified by the server. Some players may find it useful to be able to view and interact with these slots even when in creative mode, which this mod allows.

Creative Crafting Grid will now prevent the client from moving items from the crafting grid back into the player's inventory when closing the inventory. Toggle this functionality on or off with `/creativecrafting sticky [true|false]`, view the current configuration with `/creativecrafting sticky`.

![Creative inventory with crafting 2x2 grid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e928a42a1604b7ab089bc5541fe0e3da1afcac42.png)
